productDisplayName: Jealous 21 Women Green Tunic With Mirror Print Top
description: CompositionAqua green round neck tunic top made of 65% polyester and 35% viscose, with rouched dolman sleeves and huge placement prints on hemlineWash care1. Wash dark colours separately2. Use mild detergent in warm water (maximum 40 degrees)3. Do not wring or bleach4. Flat dry in shade5. Do not iron on printFittingRegular FitLook great when going for casual outings with friends in this green tunic top from jealous 21. The rouched dolman sleeves and aqua green colour give a beautiful liquid flow to the top and the huge placement graphic along the hemline make it look all the more interesting. This top looks great when teamed with white pants or leggings. Model's statistics1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2. Height-5.8", Chest-33"
